articles.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Science Beta: A Multi-Agent AI Workbench for Reproducible Genomics, Proteomics, and Cheminformatics Pipelines
articles.excerpt: Anthropic released Claude Science in beta on June 30, 2026.  The app runs on existing Claude models

articles.title: NVIDIA HORIZON: A Hands-Free Agent that Evolves Git Worktrees and Hits 100% RTL Benchmark Completion
articles.excerpt: A hands-free NVIDIA agent framework hosts each RTL problem as a versioned repository, reaching 100% completion across benchmarks.  The post NVIDIA HORIZON: A Hands-Free Agent that Evolves Git Worktrees and Hits 100% R...

articles.title: xAI releases Grok-4.3 with native long-horizon agent scaffolding
articles.excerpt: New model demonstrates 4.2× improvement on multi-step software engineering benchmarks and sustains coherent agent trajectories beyond 110k tokens.

articles.title: Figure 03 completes 43-hour autonomous factory shift with zero interventions
articles.excerpt: Humanoid achieves new milestone in unsupervised operation, performing 1,240 unique tasks across three assembly lines at the BMW South Carolina plant.

articles.title: NVIDIA AI Introduces ASPIRE: A Self-Improving Robotics Framework Reaching 31% Zero-Shot on LIBERO-Pro Long Tasks
articles.excerpt: NVIDIA's ASPIRE writes and refines robot control programs, then distills validated repairs into a reusable skill library.  It gains up to 77 points on LIBERO-Pro and transfers zero-shot to unseen long-horizon tasks

articles.title: Anthropic publishes unprecedented mechanistic interpretability map of Claude 4
articles.excerpt: Researchers reverse-engineered 312 million features inside the model, including the first clear "deception circuit" discovered in a frontier model.

articles.title: Mistral AI Releases Leanstral 1.5: An Apache-2.0 Lean 4 Code Agent Model Solving 587 of 672 PutnamBench Problems
articles.excerpt: Mistral AI released Leanstral 1. 0 code agent model for Lean 4
